title: Sample Analysis: NBA Win Prediction
text:
This project builds a machine learning pipeline to predict NBA game outcomes using modern NBA data from 2021–2026.


The goal of this analysis is to estimate whether the home team wins a given NBA game using engineered matchup features.




Data cleaning
Exploratory data analysis
Rolling feature engineering
Matchup differential features
Logistic Regression
Ridge and Lasso regularization
Random Forest
XGBoost
ROC-AUC evaluation
Time-based validation




The tuned Logistic Regression model performed best overall. More complex models such as Random Forest and XGBoost did not outperform it, suggesting that the engineered matchup features captured strong linear predictive structure.

title: Aayush Pandey
text:
I am a physics and mathematics student interested in data science, machine learning, sports analytics, and quantitative modeling.
This website includes my professional application materials and a sample data analysis project.



Resume
Cover Letter
Sample Analysis: NBA Win Prediction




My sample analysis builds a machine learning pipeline to predict NBA game outcomes using modern NBA data from 2021–2026.
The project includes data cleaning, exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, rolling team statistics, matchup differential features, model comparison, and interpretation.
